programme.desc: Donna, Bos y Diane se van en busca de apoyo para Mutiny, mientras que todos los demás esperan ansiosamente el gran día. Joe le pide a Cam un favor.

programme.desc: Donna prevé un nuevo futuro para Internet e intenta reunir a todos en Comdex. Gordon se enfrenta a Joanie, quien resulta tener un fuerte carácter.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: La visión de Donna crea una discusión acalorada sobre el próximo gran avance, y sobre cómo alcanzarlo. El resultado final puede no ser satisfactorio para todos.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon disfruta del éxito mientras Joe trabaja para mantener su proyecto web a flote. Cameron prolonga su viaje de negocios. Donna lanza un nuevo emprendimiento.

programme.desc: Joe y Cameron hablan por teléfono. Donna promueve a su asistente. El negocio de Gordon se abrocha bajo la presión de un competidor más grande.

programme.desc: Donna lucha contra la sospecha. Bosworth llega a su punto límite. Joe le quita trabajo a Gordon mientras Cameron confronta errores del pasado.

programme.desc: Brenda comienza el día con ganas de fiesta y confiesa su amor por uno de los Shore. La tensión sexual entre Chile y Anahí continúa.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Jey invita a Dania a una noche romántica pero la noche no sale como la tenia planeada. Potro regresa a la casa y se lleva a los shore a una clase de lucha libre. La tensión en contra de Anahí aumenta.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Una nueva integrante llega a la casa y Chile queda flechado con ella aunque sus planes indican que va tras otro Shore.

programme.title: Acapulco shore

programme.desc: La relación entre Dania y Jey sigue en problemas mientras que Brenda comienza su campaña para irse a los golpes con Rocío. Dania y Anahí por fin tienen su iniciación.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Llega el día de la última fiesta en la casa y el desmadre comienza. La boss le entrega una carta a Jawy de Mane y la nostalgia lo invade.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienza para los de Shore y en esta ocasión Mazatlán será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha y Mane se enfrentan a Dania al ver que le tira sus cosas al agua. Los mariscos llegan para la cruda y la ida a un bar termina en una fiesta en la casa. Mane molesta a Dania y un nuevo enfrentamiento entre ellas comienza a gestarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una nueva integrante llega a la casa. La boss anuncia que tienen que trabajar para ser parte del carnaval. El team tendo insiste en que Jey se lleve a la cama a Nacha y un bar es el sitio de encuentros y desencuentros de la familia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Fernanda se van a los golpes. El conclave decide hacerle un examen a Fernanda para evitar su expulsión. Un partido de fútbol entre los Shore y los Big hippo decidirá el futuro de la casa y Pepe recibe una propuesta de amor eterno.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Relationship between Dania and Jey continues to be in trouble while Brenda starts her's campaign to throw punches at Rocio. Dania and Anahí finally have their initiation ritual.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The last party day is here and chaos begins. The boss deliver a letter from Mane to Jewy and nostalgia invades him.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: A new vacation begins for the Shores, and this time Mazatlán will witness the parties, loves, heartbreaks, and fights of the most dysfunctional family on television.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: A misdelivered package arrives at the doorstep of a love-crazed Ranpha who has recently lost her former boyfriend Melty Way. It turns out to be an android lover from the Full Monty Company.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: In an Old West-style town, Forte and Vanilla have been dispatched to search for Lost Technology. Forte and Vanilla both split their own ways with Vanilla working for the doctor of the local clinic.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels play a baseball game against the men from the Transbaal Navy. Due to Colonel Volcott's drunken stupor and a bet he made with the Admiral, they have to win the game or else they must wear negligees and be conscripted into the Navy if they lose.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Mint and Ranpha were kidnapped during a mission and the kidnappers demand a large ransom in return. Unable to pay off the ransom, Forte and Milfeulle devise a plan to get the money by faking another kidnapping incident with Colonel Volcott.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte befriends a juvenile delinquent girl named Milly who was the daughter of a crime boss. She tries to cheat out of paying for food before Forte sees her gun and notes something strange about Milly.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Vanilla allegedly loses a valuable item that she was carrying with her at all times. As a result, she has fasted for two weeks and hasn't eaten a bite since then. Unless the mysterious item can be found, Vanilla won't break her fast and will die.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte comes back after a long mission, only to find that everyone believes she is dead! Apparently, Ranpha used Forte's "death" as an excuse for missing her date with a guy she likes, letting the situation go out of hand.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels' new mission is capturing a runaway sentient tank. Milfeulle and Mint get on the tank as it rampages in the city. Has the sentient tank developed feelings of friendship for the two girls? Can the Angels successfully stop it?

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte destroys her engine after pushing it too hard without breaking it in. Forte, Mint, and Vanilla find the nearest space station in an attempt to try to get Forte's engine repaired.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Lucky Milfeulle wins a free dinner at a fancy restaurant and brings Normad along as a date to teach her table manners. On the way there, they chance upon a pastry stall and Milfeulle is impressed with the delicious pastries.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The military plane that Mint and Forte were traveling in crashes, stranding them on a deserted island. Mint and Forte team up with the island's sole resident Max to find ways to call for help.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Ranpha, Mint, and Vanilla go to a pizzeria that is open in late-night hours. However, the pizzeria is unexpectedly closed. Ranpha does not believe it and sneaks in.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: During the search for the lost technology, Mint gets stuck in a cutboard figure on top of the mountain viewing area. Meanwhile the mountain is sinking into the sea.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels are approached by Mr. God, a retired comedian who tries to make Vanilla laugh. He failed to do so in his last show despite everyone else laughing, resulting in an accident.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The human race is being attacked by its mysterious arch-enemy, a giant dice named Kyutaro. As the Angels try to attack Kyutaro, the dice is invulnerable to any human attack and easily defeats the Angels.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels are filing their expense reports when the Commander informs them that the Milfeulle who has been with them all this time is a fake.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angel's (last) mission is escorting the mysterious client Johnny in a truck through a desert wilderness. As each Angel takes turns to drive, Ranpha becomes jealous as she loses to other Angels in deciding who goes next.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: On the road to Megalopolis, Tetsuro is encountered by Count Mecha and watches as his mother is killed.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: The capital of Mars, Great Syrtis. It is a deserted planet with nothing but the blowing of the red winds.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series: The Great Bandit Antares
programme.desc: The great bandit Antares hijacks the 999 and takes Tetsuro and the gang hostage as he forces them to make an unplanned stop at his home.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Pluto, the resting place for the bodies of those who have replaced their human bodies with mechanical ones.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Tetsuro foolishly falls asleep and is taken by Hanako aboard the train bound for Wildflower Station. He is introduced to Hanako's elderly parents as her fiancé.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: The 999 has to make an emergency stop at Fossilized Planet, a place petrified all the way to the tracks. Tetsuro is curious about the fossils and leaves the 999.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Will Farmer investigates the life of a talented but little known sculptor. Does any of his work survive and if so can Will help the artist's family to trace it?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Adam Schoon investigates one of the most incredible adventure stories of all time led by one of the biggest names in exploration, Sir Ernest Shackleton.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Hilary Kay investigates a tiny Victorian sketchbook but who was the artist and how did he come to lose what must have been a treasured possession?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Graham Lay investigates an embroidered tablecloth. Covered in signatures, it was made by female prisoners in a Japanese internment camp during the 2nd World War.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael presents his first Antiques Roadshow from the Victoria and Albert Museum in London. The experts uncover a treasure trove of unusual objects, including an original hand-written poem by WB Yeats, examples of Meissen, and a rare silver tobacco box.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: A visit to Barnstaple in North Devon turns up an important enamel miniature by Henry Bone, a valuable collection of walking sticks, a World War I pilot's watch, a valuable painting from the Newlyn School, and a 19th-century native Canadian octopus bag.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit the Valley Leisure Centre in Biddulph, Staffordshire. Featured are a rare Wedgwood egg scrambler, a Constable sketch, an English repeater watch, a remarkable collection of ship's documents, and Queen Victoria's handkerchief.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Glamis Castle in Angus, Scotland. They find a posy ring with a grim story, a dining table used for resting a coffin on, diamond jewelry, 18th-century miniatures with musical connections, and the scrapbook of a WW1 pilot.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael introduces sequences from previous roadshows and recounts stories of the Queen Mother's early life at Glamis Castle. Featuring ivory figures, a pair of Chinese imperial bowls, a stone necklace, and a collection of handbag mirrors.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Selby in North Yorkshire to examine an embroidered picture, a copy of Beatrix Potter's book The Fairy Caravan, two rare cornets, and a Masonic porcelain collection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts visit Wisbech in Cambridgeshire where they examine a vase covered in paint and a Martinware bird. There's also an impressive collection of royal invitations, letters, sketches, and items from eminent Victorians.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael takes the experts to Blackpool to dig up a program for the 1936 cup tie between Blackpool and Bolton - including Stanley Matthews - a rare salt-glazed mug, and an unusual medal. And Michael discovers the predecessor of his big red book.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Albuquerque, New Mexico, to help Commander Rudy and his staff recruit young veterans to become members and inject new life into his VFW Post 6216 bar and hall.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: At an Ann Arbor, MI, college alumni bar, Jon is forced to deal with a hotheaded owner whose fiery temper keeps his staff on edge and his million-dollar debt on ice.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps an owner who battled childhood illness and the loss of his father learn how to run a bar and manage a business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon enlists a failing bar owner's ex-wife and former manager to help get the business back on course.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon challenges the owner of a beer-only bar being undercut by a BYOB liquor policy to harness her redneck ingenuity in order to save her business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon can't resurrect the menu and whip the staff into shape, then the coastal Massachusetts establishment Libads Bar & Grill will be lost at sea.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to the Silver Dollar in Chula Vista, California, where the unresolved tensions between the father and son owners have led to operational issues and neglect.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Maria Menounos helps Jon scope out a bar whose owner sits around as her husband does all the work and her dad picks up the bill.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to help the owner of New England's Ale House Grille, a single mom who's become reliant on a rude, incompetent manager since her husband left.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his second-ever re-rescue, Jon Taffer returns to Champagne's Cafe to help the struggling bar survive the pandemic and maintain its Las Vegas legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon has a hard time getting through to the owner of the Black Light District, who's convinced fixing up his rancid dive would be a betrayal of his punk rock credo.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon knew family-run Ohio bar The Black Sheep was in trouble before he arrived, but even he's surprised by the true nature of the bar's debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must deal with a sprawling menu, a bad layout, and a womanizing co-owner if he hopes to save Swanky Bubbles, a dysfunctional champagne bar in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A son takes over the failing family bar, and the biggest obstacle to getting out of the red is his abusive father, who spends all night sitting at the bar.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean reveals a secret to Jenna that could threaten his job. Allie and Jason fly her helicopter to the big island where they have to rescue four people trapped on a volcanic lava reef.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jessie tries to overcome her condition to compete in the Maui triathlon with Dawn as her coach. Allie suspects an agenda behind Dawn's motives. Jason and Kekoa seek a mysterious underwater Hawaiian spirit that lures people to their deaths.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean tries to keep his relationship with Jenna a secret. When the team has to rescue swimmers trapped in a filtration tube, Jenna is sucked down a shaft and Sean risks everything to save her, revealing his darkest secret.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: No longer able to cope with his guilt of surviving the attack on Pearl Harbor, Jessie's grandfather comes to Hawaii to end his life. Can Mitch intervene in time? Kekoa and Sean help a college basketball player learn to swim.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Mitch goes undercover to stop an ex-Navy SEAL turned eco-terrorist from detonating a deadly underwater explosive device. When Mitch's dive gear floats to the surface, Sean and the team fear the worst.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean clashes with Jenna. A new love triangle emerges between new recruit Zack and rookie hopeful Carrie, who’s more interested in Jason. Sean and new lifeguard Leigh Dwyer confront daredevil Cliff, whose dangerous antics disrupt the Baywatch team.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: A teenager's waverunner causes accidents and his father threatens to sue Baywatch for not rescuing him ahead of his victims. JD takes out his personal problems on Sean. Zack relentlessly pursues Carrie while she pursues Jason.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean and Jenna clash when she tries to close Baywatch so investors can develop the property. Carrie is afraid she's not lifeguard material after her reluctance to jump into the water from a hovering helicopter.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Leigh goes hang gliding with Sam Parks, a daredevil pilot who puts her life in danger. Things go horribly wrong when Kekoa's cousin, Nani, parties on a boat with drunken frat boys and ends up alone in the ocean.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: A plane carrying a donor's heart crashes, and it’s up to Jason to make a desperate dive to retrieve the heart before the patient dies. Two hooligans steal a car and end up trapped underwater. Jenna tries to get Leigh to turn against Sean.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: To avoid jail, Danny joins Team Baywatch. Leigh doesn't trust him. Kekoa battles her father over her lifeguard career and moves out. JD, Zack, and Jason hustle two gorgeous women who turn out to be con artists who turn the tables on them.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jenna convinces ruthless Councilman McKenna to close the Training Center. Sean suspends Zack after he severely injures JD during a rescue. Kekoa expresses her deep love for JD – but to Leigh! Zack sees a ghostly woman from his dreams.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean confronts a "shark tour" operator dangerously dumping chum to lure sharks. A tourist who wants to be a hero to impress his son keeps interfering with Jason's rescues. JD and Kekoa try to keep their passionate relationship a secret.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean's incredible guilt after a surfing accident leads to a crisis of faith. Zack has to choose between loyalty to his Baywatch teammates and his competitive ambitions.

programme.title: Bellator 198: Fedor vs Mir
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Chicago, IL with a historic matchup in the Heavyweight Grand Prix as two former world champs collide when Fedor Emelianenko takes on Frank Mir. Plus Neiman Gracie returns to action, while submission ace Dillon Danis makes his debut.

programme.title: Bellator 199: Bader vs King Mo
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with an absolutely stacked fight card as Ryan Bader collides with King Mo in Heavyweight Grand Prix action; Paul Daley takes on Jon Fitch in a dynamic matchup at welterweight, and Cheick Kongo and Javy Ayala go toe to toe.

programme.title: Bellator 200: Carvalho vs Mousasi
programme.desc: Bellator MMA’s historic 200th event in London features Rafael Carvalho putting his middleweight world title on the line against one of the best in the world, Gegard Mousasi. Plus, Michael “Venom” Page looks to finish David “The Caveman” Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator 201: Macfarlane vs Lara
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to California as women’s flyweight world champion Ilima-Lei Macfarlane looks to defend her title against fast-rising Colombian sensation Alejandra Lara. Ryan Couture takes on Saad Awad, and Juan Archuleta returns to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, OK as Julia Budd puts her women’s featherweight world championship on the line against the undefeated Talita Nogueira in the main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls as South Dakota native Logan Storley looks to extend his undefeated streak as he takes on the always dangerous AJ Matthews. Bantamweight king Darrion Caldwell moves up to featherweight to face Noad.

programme.title: Bellator 205: McKee vs Macapa
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Boise, Idaho with an explosive featherweight main event as rising star AJ McKee takes on dangerous veteran John Macapa. Also looking to stay undefeated is Rafael Lovato Jr. as he faces fellow submission specialist John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Jose. Legends Rampage Jackson and Wanderlei Silva settle the score with a rematch ten years in the making. Finally, in the main event Gegard Mousasi defends his Middleweight belt against Rory MacDonald.

programme.title: Bellator 207: Mitrione vs Bader
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun as Matt Mitrione faces off against Ryan Bader in the Heavyweight World Grand Prix semifinals. Roy “Big County” Nelson takes on dangerous Russian Sergei Kharitonov, and top welterweight contender Lorenz Larkin returns.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jon says he hates his selfish, untrustworthy dad, Jim, who works the holidays as Santa Claus! Then, pro-trainer Greg thinks he's on the show to talk health. Troy Dunn surprises him with his long-lost son! And 14-yr-old singing sensation Jackie Evancho!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Harv and Lynne say their son, Mark, is an adolescent living in a 41-year-old man’s body. Mark is currently homeless and living in his beat-up car held together with bungee cords and glue. But Mark explains that he is “car camping” and not homeless.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Over 10 years ago, Suzy says she developed a "mysterious illness" that leaves her shaking, trembling, convulsing and having to force-feed herself more than 7,000 calories a day to stop her "attacks"! What could this mysterious illness possibly be?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tammy and Paul wed for eight years until their marriage ended. After nine months apart the couple secretly remarried, unbeknownst to their families, who would not approve. Weeks after saying "I do" a second time, the two are having doubts of their own.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the fiancée of former football star Aaron Hernandez. Shayanna Jenkins- Hernandez speaks on Hernandez's suicide & responds to rumors about his sexuality & his alleged intimate relationship with a fellow inmate. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany says boyfriend Tim is evil, abusive & unfaithful. Tim admits that he can't control his rage & choked Brittany while holding their 6-month-old daughter & says he fears he'll hurt the baby next. Tim confesses to cheating with both men and women.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer Pt. 3. What creates a monster? Do chilling home videos of Jeffrey Dahmer as a little boy show an innocent child before he became evil? Or, were the signs already there? His parents reveal the red flags they say they missed.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Gina says her daughter, Alexis, 18, was "kidnapped" and "held hostage" by her survivalist boyfriend, David, 19, which Alexis and David deny. Mom Gina fears for Alexis's safety. David agrees he’s a survivalist who owns guns, but he's not dangerous. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Jordan, who has an eating disorder & weighs 75 pounds . Find out why Jordan's parents despise her boyfriend & they meet him on stage. Plus, Cleveland kidnapping survivor Michelle Knight reveals all the details of her wedding. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's hard to believe, but in America alone, there may be as many as 5,000 religious groups preying upon the weak and vulnerable, and all in the name of God. Dr. Phil's guests have warnings for you and your children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: They smoke, drink, speed, pop pills, disappear all night and disrespect their parents all day. They are teens gone wild and Dr. Phil has a wake-up call for them and their parents. Parents, if you're in power struggles with your teen, don't miss this show!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Nancy, who adamantly denies her online love relationship with "Shaun" is a scam. Nancy and her son Darcy speak face-to-face for the first time in over a year. Plus updates from past catfished guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kim & ex-husband, Ryan, are terrified of son, Rylan, 7, who has a fascination with knives, talks to an imaginary friend named "Bleeder", and has sent two teachers to the hospital. What might be causing Rylan's aggressive behavior?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Modern Family" star Julie Bowen is joining Drew and chats about her new personal care brand for tweens.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Equalizer" star Queen Latifah stops by to chat. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, In A Minute Ross is sharing an all new delicious Rossipe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, in an all-new Cookbook Club Molly Yeh joins Drew in the kitchen to whip up a yummy and comforting dish from her new cookbook, "Home is Where the Eggs Are.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Comedian Chelsea Handler is joining Drew to discuss everything from her rumored return to late night and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Making The Cut" Judge Nicole Richie updates Drew on her bearded dragon Speedy, the birthday trauma they've both experienced and what it's really like working with Heidi Klum.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News covering everything from rumors of the next actor cast as James Bond as being someone in their 30s.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest headlines with an all-new Drew's News, plus they've got sloths at the news desk!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Pilar Valdes and Drew share money-saving holiday meal. Drew & Ross Mathews talk empowering single moms, Greta Gerwig's thoughts on a movie, and feature Drew-crime segment with two great grandmas stopping a purse snatcher. (200)

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" continue their Drew's News takeover and hitting today's hottest headlines like the woman who threw a party and invited sixty-five of her dating app matches.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Camilla Cabello opens-up about dating, what she's looking for in her next partner, working with relationship goals couple Gwen Stefani and Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Grand Crew" star Echo Kellum is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to cover headlines like who Billboard reports is the most popular artist on the planet.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Neighborhood" star Cedric the Entertainer is telling Drew about his twenty years of marriage and being back on the road again doing comedy shows.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side in a special Game Changers Edition of Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest topics like why Cher says she shouldn't be called an icon and the recent opinion piece on tipping that has people debating.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kristina Zias talks nostalgic fashion trends and wedding etiquette with Drew & Ross Mathews. Brendan Fraser's comeback and scientific reasons behind listening to sad songs on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew interviews President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden, discussing their relationship and Christmas traditions. FLOTUS gives a tour of the White House Christmas Decorations.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson is filling in for Drew as co-host for the day! Comedian Ziwe Fumudoh stops by to chat about the new season of her late-night talk show "Ziwe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A League of Their Own" star Abbi Jacobson opens up about her recent engagement, her bestie Ilana Glazer, what it was like co-creating, writing, producing and starring in "A League of Their Own" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ralph Macchio opens up to Drew about his new memoir, "Waxing On: The Karate Kid and Me." Plus, Dennis Rodman joins Drew and Ross Mathews at thew news desk to help serve the news sunny-side up!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: t's Drew-love with Melanie Lynskey and Jason Ritter who are reflecting on their relationship over the years, growing their family and supporting each other through tough times.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Danny Seo is joining the Drew's News desk to cover headlines like the 93-year-old who went viral for her dating do's and don't's and the study that found a lot of Americans only clean once every six months.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is sick, and Dr. Granny springs into action with a chimp as a nurse. But Ellie's bear Fairchild has taken a liking to granny's flu remedy. During this, Mrs. Drysdale tries to impress society Mrs. Van Ransonhoff.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is evicted because his 50 cent allowance won't cover the rent. The other Clampetts take over the space with Granny will cut hair or pull teeth. Jed will sharpen tools and whittle something. Ellie is the pretty receptionist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Drysdales now jog so the banker can get the account of Jason Detweiler, head of a running club. The Clampetts don't understand the concept, leading to misunderstandings, then Ellie and Jethro become enthusiastic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A violent criminal escapes during a prison transfer and Wycliffe believes one of his visitors, a respectable artist, might be helping him evade authorities.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: An overly helpful witness in a young man's murder gets too close to Lucy, and Wycliffe believes the real murderer might live even closer to home.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa's hippie mother Eleanor arrives in the village, immediately taking over Martin's kitchen to prepare a herbal tonic, which she later gives to the baby to stop his crying.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: PC Penhale is shocked by the unexpected arrival of his ex-wife Maggie, who appears to have forgotten that they separated years ago and wants to know why he left her.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Maggie gets the all-clear from the doctor and decides she will return to Bude, forcing PC Penhale to take desperate measures to persuade her to stay in Portwenn.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Bert Large's restaurant business is in financial trouble: he can't even afford the food and drink for a charity event to raise money for Florence Dingle's cat sanctuary.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon goes to East Germany to bring back a defector who is planning to trade a list of secret agents in return for the life of his father.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar decides to aid Israeli operatives in the capture of an escaped Nazi war criminal.

programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: Morning Buzz
programme.desc: Start your day with the latest top sports headlines and highlights.

programme.title: Midday Rundown
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ keeps you completely up to speed on all the top trending stories dominating the sports world.

programme.title: Trending Now
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La sombra de la duda
programme.desc: Jamie y Eddie investigan cuando una mujer sufre una reacción alérgica a su medicación y descubren que su esposo, un técnico de emergencia, no respondió a la llamada de emergencia pese a estar asignado para hacerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la ex miembro del equipo de la UAC y actual agente de la Interpol, Emily Prentiss localiza a un asesino en serie internacional, pide la ayuda de sus amigos de la UAC.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que está desfigurando víctimas a propósito. Además, Rossi tiene un encuentro incómodo con su exesposa, Hayden Montgomery, quien mantuvo a su hija, Joy, en secreto durante casi 30 años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los guardias de la prisión en Virginia interceptan un paquete de pruebas relacionadas con el secuestro de dos niños hace varios años, la UAC interroga a un famoso asesino serial que puede tener información sobre el paradero de los niños.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se sorprende cuando Hotch es arrestado por un equipo SWAT y por sospecha de conspiración, mientras el equipo se apresura a demostrar su inocencia, sospechan que se avecina un complot mayor.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Apagón
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra literalmente a oscuras cuando la investigación sobre la muerte de un teniente se relaciona con un apagón en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Juego de niños
programme.desc: El trabajo diurno de un marine muerto en un laboratorio de ideas del gobierno lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a la vida de un niño prodigio de 12 años que puede ser el próximo objetivo del asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fe
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo alistado de un coronel retirado convertido en predicador aparece muerto, el equipo cree que puede ser víctima de un crimen de odio. Mientras tanto, el padre de Gibbs viene de visita por vacaciones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The final four rednecks look forward to making a run for the hundred grand and are shocked to find one of them being eliminated in a good old-fashioned shoot out right before getting that chance.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Eight modern-day cowboys and cowgirls train to compete for the first-ever million-dollar prize in horse reining, one of the toughest and most dangerous sports in the world.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: As the riders prepare for the Cactus Classic, Matt struggles when his horse has health issues, and Abby feels the pressure in her first competition since going solo.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Leading up to the Run for a Million show, Andrea undercuts Matt's search for the perfect horse, Abby deals with a flooded practice arena, and Craig seeks a much-needed payday.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: At the National Reining Breeders Classic, Jason has a chance to prove his skills equal Andrea's, and Cade has to come through in the clutch.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Abby faces a tough decision, Casey deals with mounting home-construction costs, and the pressure rises as the riders choose the horses they'll take to Run for a Million.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: In the first annual Run for a Million in Las Vegas, the riders compete for the first-ever million-dollar purse in horse-reining history.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As 51 rookies and veterans arrive to chase their dreams, the candidates hope to prove their talent with a standout solo performance and take on the kick line in the Judges' Showcase.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft comes to the first rehearsal to see which newbies have showmanship, DCC alum Natalie Woods hosts a rookie at her home, and Kelli and Judy make the first cuts of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 47 hopefuls learn the mechanics of the kickline, a rookie's injuries put her out of commission, and choreographer Evan Miller teaches a dance routine that calls for power and precision.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With nine cuts looming before the team's first game, the hopefuls show off their freestyle dancing, get fit for their official uniforms and learn new choreography from Denise Dicharry.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Choreographer Criscilla Anderson uses her cancer battle to inspire the dancers, veteran mentors offer style tips to the rookies, and Travis Wall helps Judy and Kelli make their next cut.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The hopefuls practice the highly precise entrance routine and jump kicks for the first time, Jordann shares a vulnerable personal story, and Judy and Kelli make two more tough cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the remaining ladies try out for the media-savvy Show Group, Judy and Kelli are faced with yet another difficult decision, and some dancers rise to glory while others' hearts are broken.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A biohazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man takes off running, a woman interferes with a traffic stop involving her boyfriend, and deputies respond to a dispute between a man and his girlfriend's son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers split up to interrogate two men suspected of stealing a pick-up truck, a motorist tries to ditch a bag of meth, and police discover a bunch of syringes in a vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for backup after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Police officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl in search of ticket scalpers. Police Department investigates a theft at a local store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist crashes into an occupied trailer, a stubborn suspect plays dumb, and officers are disappointed when they run into a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sibling reluctantly called authorities when his belligerent brother refused to leave his mother's home. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle parked at a local gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when he was signaled to stop. Officers investigate a call regarding a suspicious parked car. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence. A 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects fleeing from a stolen vehicle. A drunk driver is pulled over after a brief chase. Officers receive a call for help from a juvenile about an attempted break-in.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is called to a murder of a 17-year-old in a casino penthouse. The entire team gets involved when its discovered that a kidnapping took place along with the murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The killer from The Execution of Catherine Willows returns with deadly results.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman who was pulled over by the police is found murdered two miles up the road from the stop. It's not long before Robbins determines that the woman is, genetically speaking, not a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the starving death of a five-year-old boy. They discover the boy has siblings who are in danger too.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito vs los monstruos

programme.desc: Pepito descubre que el objeto que compró es una lámpara maravillosa, y pide toda clase de deseos. Pero ahora que su padrastro lo sabe y la quiere ocupar para hacer el mal, debe evitar que lo consiga.

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito detectives

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito vs los monstruos
programme.desc: Chabelo y Pepito van de excursión con un grupo de scouts y se enfrentan al peligro en una cueva maldita. La aventura comienza cuando encuentran a varios monstruos y deciden destruirlos.

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito en la lámpara maravillosa
programme.desc: Pepito descubre que el objeto que compró es una lámpara maravillosa, y pide toda clase de deseos. Pero ahora que su padrastro lo sabe y la quiere ocupar para hacer el mal, debe evitar que lo consiga.

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: El maquinista
programme.desc: Trevor lleva más de un año con problemas para dormir. Cuando aparecen notas en su casa y sus alucinaciones causan un accidente, tratará de descubrir si hay un complot para enloquecerlo, o si su cansancio le ha hecho perder la razón.

programme.title: Ni un pelo de tonto

programme.title: Garras

programme.title: Desapareció una noche

programme.title: Casadas con el mismo hombre

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán

programme.title: Tiempo de morir
programme.desc: Después de cumplir 18 años por matar a un hombre en un duelo, un hombre regresa a su ciudad natal decidido a llevar una vida normal, pero los hijos del hombre al que mató están empeñados en vengarse.

programme.title: Ultimo cuerpo

programme.title: El templo del oro

programme.title: El rostro oscuro de la ley

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: An old school chum thinks it's time Kate was married again, and she tells the girls to round up some prospects.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: After five years of struggle, Rob finally finishes his first book.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Comedy writer Rob Petrie talks his wife Laura into leaving their 'sick' son Ritchie with a babysitter while they attend a big party.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When five terrorists whose plan to pass through a security checkpoint at a boating dock fails, they flee taking on several hostages including Inspector Steve Keller.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A troubled teen from a broken home is suspected of shooting a friend's stepfather.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A killer ends up working with a witness to their crime.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix uncovers an unsolved homicide while protecting a controversial writer.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre, lo que hablaba del horror del crimen: el asesinato de dos niños pequeños y el apuñalamiento de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio
programme.desc: Una empleada de una tintorería fue violada y asesinada en la tienda. La policía recurrió a la ciencia forense en busca de las respuestas que necesitaban.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un auto en una zanja de drenaje con dos cuerpos adentro, una punta de un dedo de un guante de látex encontrada en la escena del crimen apuntaría a los investigadores hacia el asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Emboscada en la escuela dominical
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los investigadores examinan las cenizas de un incendio que mató a una mujer de 40 años. El fuego parecía haber sido iniciado por un cigarrillo desatendido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, la muerte de Crystal Purcell fue considerada un accidente. Luego en el 2001, Barbara Purcell llamó a la policía para sugerir que su desaparecido esposo había matado a Crystal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, un terrorista en serie apunta a un juez, dos abogados e incluso a una casa de la corte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los cuerpos de varias mujeres se encuentran en una colina distante en California. La policía hace un descubrimiento cuando una prostituta se escapa y logra identificar a su agresor y su automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that they are on an alien planet divided into different time zones where human soldiers fight never-ending wars.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Fear Factor South Africa
programme.desc: As the number of contestants falls to 9, the ties that bind are like a vice grip.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Celebrity 2. To move flags from one open window across and around the outside of a building. To separate and move white snakes out of a group of green. To escape from a submerged cage and swim to a life ring.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants enter the water where there is a 30-yard long tunnel. Unhatched duck's embryo boiled 30 minutes and then served. Contestants must ride a bicycle across a 10" wide plank that is suspended between two buildings.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink toed tarantulas into torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. The contestant lies in a plexi-glass tube as water is pumped in.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To stand naked in public. Contestants have to eat 0-5 live Madagascar hissing cockroaches. Players are wrapped in heavy chain around their ankles and submerged into a tank of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To gather as many flags as possible. To play a game of pool and eat the assigned items. To run across shipping containers planting flags.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one roof to the other roof. To search for and eat coagulated blood balls hidden in earthworms. To escape from a submerged fuselage.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Clip show of the greatest moments from Season 2.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To unlock the Fear Factor straight-jacket the quickest. To gather the most flags the fastest.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To Swim with Alligators. Spin on a turntable and eat the assigned buffet. Players need to make their way through the inside of a runaway Tanker Truck to retrieve a key and unlock the box.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Everyone knows Bigfoot, an enormous truck that crushes everything in its path. Contestant descends into 10-foot high tank filled with water and ribbon snakes. Suspended from a 40 ton crane hangs a clear Plexiglas box.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Three steel girders are attached to a crane, 100 feet off the ground. Contestant walks on broken glass. A car is held up by an electromagnetic crane.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are going back to New York in one week and Lucy is determined not to leave Hollywood with the proper souvenirs. She's already got a box full of memorabilia but she still wants more.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on the deck of the Constitution, ready to set sail for Europe when Lucy rushes down the gangplank for one last goodbye to Little Ricky who will be in her mother's care while she is away.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous after Ricky dances with Angela Randall, an up-and-coming British actress. She gets Ricky away from her by going to the country estate of Sir Clive Richardson, a prominent English film producer, for a fox hunt he is hosting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Genius prodigy boy Romanoff has ten doctorates from Russia's Public Academy; blustering that no greater than he exists, he challenges Lupin. Since Fujiko is involved, Lupin cannot back down; what will become of this challenge?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko is the model for Norway's famous sculptor Vingel's crystal mermaid statue; she believed when he said he would give it to her the day it was finished, but Vingel gets greedy and sells it to the mayor of the city of Bergen instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin tries to steal a bunch of diamonds from a diamond auction. But the auction auditorium is at the Marine Tower above a skyscraper, and there is only one transparent elevator to get there.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin heads to Mecca to steal Mohammed's treasure. But first he is confronted by Patra Lawrence, the grandaughter of the Lawrence of Arabia, who is the chief of Mecca's special police headquarters; how will Lupin steal the treasure now?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Fujiko instigates Lupin and friends to go steal; this time their target is the Jovich Piano installed in a music hall built around it. There is no door large enough in the hall to carry the piano out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the shipment of raw diamonds that arrived at a harbor in Nice; he sneaks into the storage in the middle of the night but Zenigata was on to him. Lupin escapes with the help of Jigen and Goemon, but Fujiko gets captured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A month ago, president Gappolini of one of the world's top five trading companies, had died. Gappolini bequeathed a will saying that the heir to the company presidency will be the world's finest sharpshooter and Jigen is a target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's said that immense sums of money confiscated from organized crime get transported to a Swiss bank by ICPO, once a year. Naturally, Lupin wants a piece of that action, so he steals the armed security vehicle along with Zenigata in it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The city of Grand Hexagon lies at the border of France and Spain; the city is designed with six sides. But at the center of the city is Raika Bank storing fifty tons of gold bullion; an alarm will go off if even one bullion is missing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Robot soldier Lamda flies above the sky of Tokyo, raids a jewelry store. Its creator, professor Oyamada's daughter Maki and Lupin say that it was just a show to demonstrate the inhumanity of robots.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Voyage to Danger
programme.desc: Someone sent orders to assassinate Lupin. Will he survive or die trying!?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #6 Dragon of Doom
programme.desc: On the bottom of the ocean, within the sunken Titanic, the golden dragon statue waits. When Lupin and the gang are hired to retrieve it, Goemon recognizes the dragon as one of his clan's treasures. Now, he's ready to fight his own friends to protect it!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #7 The Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure
programme.desc: To retrieve the Harimao's Treasure, Lupin and the gang must gather three lost statues. Lupin reluctantly partners with the aging "double-O" MI-6 agent Sir Archer and his granddaughter Diana to gather the statues.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #8 The Secret of Twilight Gemini
programme.desc: As Lupin's mentor Don Dolune lies on his deathbed, he hands the master thief a gift: the diamond named Twilight. But it's only half of the treasure-the other half of the Twilight can be found in Morocco…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Notorious gangster, Al Capone left behind five tiles that reveal the location of his massive gold hoard when put together. Out of the five tiles, Lupin and Fujiko have three in their possession.

programme.desc: The Brits host a luxurious open house for their $45 million Bel Air listing; sparks fly when Flagg and Altman come face to face; Madison gets creative in selling a Malibu country home; Flagg and Bobby tie the knot in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
